sql.query: SELECT category, account, amount FROM (SELECT CASE ev.accounttype WHEN 'A' THEN '1. Assets' WHEN 'L' THEN '2. Liabilities' WHEN 'O' THEN '3. Owner Equity' END AS category, ev.value || ' - ' || ev.name AS account, CASE ev.accounttype WHEN 'L' THEN SUM(fa.amtacctcr) - SUM(fa.amtacctdr) ELSE SUM(fa.amtacctdr) - SUM(fa.amtacctcr) END AS amount FROM fact_acct fa JOIN c_elementvalue ev ON ev.c_elementvalue_id = fa.account_id WHERE fa.ad_client_id IN ('__CLIENT_ID__') AND fa.factaccttype NOT IN ('R', 'C') AND ev.accounttype IN ('A', 'L', 'O') AND ('__YEARID__' = '' OR fa.dateacct <= (SELECT MAX(p.enddate) FROM c_period p WHERE p.c_year_id = '__YEARID__')) AND ('__ORGID__' = '' OR ad_isorgincluded(fa.ad_org_id, '__ORGID__', fa.ad_client_id) <> -1) AND ('__ACCTSCHEMAID__' = '' OR fa.c_acctschema_id = '__ACCTSCHEMAID__') GROUP BY ev.accounttype, ev.value, ev.name HAVING ABS(SUM(fa.amtacctdr) - SUM(fa.amtacctcr)) > 0.01 UNION ALL SELECT '3. Owner Equity' AS category, 'Net Income' AS account, SUM(fa.amtacctcr - fa.amtacctdr) AS amount FROM fact_acct fa JOIN c_elementvalue ev ON ev.c_elementvalue_id = fa.account_id WHERE fa.ad_client_id IN ('__CLIENT_ID__') AND fa.factaccttype NOT IN ('R', 'C') AND ev.accounttype IN ('R', 'E') AND ('__YEARID__' = '' OR fa.dateacct <= (SELECT MAX(p.enddate) FROM c_period p WHERE p.c_year_id = '__YEARID__')) AND ('__ORGID__' = '' OR ad_isorgincluded(fa.ad_org_id, '__ORGID__', fa.ad_client_id) <> -1) AND ('__ACCTSCHEMAID__' = '' OR fa.c_acctschema_id = '__ACCTSCHEMAID__')) q ORDER BY category, account
